requirements.title: Direct id recall must bypass ranked top_k
requirements.description: When fab_recall receives explicit ids, it must fetch known ids from the read-set store even if they were omitted from ranked candidates.

requirements.title: Related edges must normalize bare/store-qualified/redirected ids
requirements.description: include_related must support the documented bare stable-id edge format, current store-qualified ids, and id redirects after layer flips.

requirements.title: Vector semantic search must be observable
requirements.description: Operators must be able to tell whether configured semantic search actually loaded fastembed and which model is active.

requirements.title: Public store-only surface must stop teaching retired roots
requirements.description: Public schemas, installed skills, and hooks must not describe project-local .fabric/knowledge as runtime source of truth.

constraints.constraint: Explicit ids MUST be treated as direct lookup requests, not only as filters over surfaced candidates.
constraints.rationale: Known id fetch should not depend on ranking/top_k.

constraints.constraint: Related-edge matching MUST resolve bare ids, store-qualified ids, and knowledge_id_redirect mappings.
constraints.rationale: Parser contract documents bare stable ids while runtime candidates are store-qualified.

constraints.constraint: Team-sourced related edges MUST NOT point to personal KP targets, including store-qualified personal:KP forms.
constraints.rationale: Avoid topology leakage from shared/team knowledge into personal graph shape.

domain.problem_statement: Knowledge search is close but not done. The remaining work is mostly correctness and surface alignment before scale indexing: direct id recall, related-edge normalization, embedder health, store-only schema/template cleanup, and a few low-risk review/install fixes.

terminology.definition: Fetch a known stable id body from the read-set store without requiring ranked candidate surfacing.
Resolve related references across bare, store-qualified, and redirected id forms.
Runtime observability of whether semantic vector retrieval is active or falling back.

non_goals.title: Do not build a vector database first
non_goals.rationale: Correctness and contract drift are higher priority than scale optimization.

non_goals.title: Do not inject pending entries into normal recall
non_goals.rationale: Pending remains review-only by architecture contract.

insights.summary: Fix P0 direct-id and related-edge correctness before derived indexing.
Runtime is mostly store-only, but public contract text still leaks retired dual-root concepts.
Semantic search should stay enabled with the current Chinese model, but needs runtime health reporting.

open_questions.question: Should derived metadata index be store-local only, or store-local plus binding-level filtered view?
